title: Junior Business Development Manager at Anarock Property Consultants

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Anarock Property Consultants
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Anarock Property Consultants in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Anarock Property Consultants:
Anarock Property Consultants is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anarock Property Consultants!
